article_title: Celtic set sights on Robbie Keane to succeed Martin O’Neill as manager

tweet_text: 🚨 Ollie Watkins scores the winner as Aston Villa triumph 1-0 against Lille in the Europa League first leg! A much-needed boost for Villa and Unai Emery. 💪⚽ #AVFC #UEL
article_title: Watkins keeps Aston Villa on Europa League trophy trail with first-leg winner at Lille
